assistant_input_placeholder: Describe what you want to do with this field or block...
assistant_workspace_empty: I'm ready. Hover a field and click the AI icon to start.
assistant_workspace_meta_current: Current state of the targeted block
assistant_context_waiting: Choose a field or block to open the assistant.
assistant_greeting_field: I can help with “:label” inside the :block block. Tell me what you need.
assistant_greeting_block: I can work on the :block block. Tell me what you need.
assistant_reply_field_ready: I prepared a few variants for “:label”.
assistant_reply_content_ready: I prepared a proposal for the :block block.
assistant_reply_seo_ready: I prepared an SEO proposal for this context.
assistant_applied: The AI proposal has been kept.
assistant_restored: The original content has been restored.
assistant_error_empty_message: Describe what you expect from the assistant first.
assistant_error_unavailable: The AI assistant is currently unavailable.
assistant_error_same_locale: Translation requires a different source locale.
assistant_error_missing_context: I don't have enough context to work on this field or block.
assistant_summary_pages_note: This summary stays inside the assistant until you copy it manually.
assistant_summary_posts_note: You can apply this summary directly to the article excerpt.
